 {'date': '2026-03-16 19:07:47',
  'headline': '1 Services Stock to Target This Week and 2 We Turn Down',
  'publisher': 'StockStory',
  'summary': 'Business services providers thrive by solving complex '
             'operational challenges for their clients, allowing them to focus '
             'on their secret sauce. Still, investors are uneasy as firms face '
             'challenges from AI-driven disruptors and tightening corporate '
             'budgets. These doubts have caused the industry to lag recently '
             'as services stocks have collectively shed 6.8% over the past six '
             'months. This performance was discouraging since the S&P 500 held '
             'its ground.',
  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/1-services-stock-target-week-190747847.html'},
 {'date': '2026-03-10 00:20:44',
  'headline': 'Is It Time To Reassess Arlo Technologies (ARLO) After Its '
              'Recent Share Price Swings',
  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'If you are wondering whether Arlo Technologies at US$14.07 is '
             'still reasonably priced after its run in recent years, you are '
             'not alone. The stock has seen mixed recent moves, with a 28.3% '
             'return over the past year and a very large gain over 3 years, '
             'alongside a 13.5% return over 30 days and an 8.0% decline over '
             'the last week. Recent attention on smart home security and '
             'connected devices has kept Arlo on many watchlists, with '
             'investors reacting to product developments and the broader '
             'interest...',
  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/time-reassess-arlo-technologies-arlo-002044914.html'},
